title: calamagrostis littorea
intro: Calamagrostis littorea, also known as sea fescue, is a type of perennial grass native to coastal areas. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calamagrostis littorea include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and aiding in wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for consumption, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
